title: Tremor Technologies
content: Design system, admin UI redesign, and authentication flow mapping at Tremor Technologies. Built a unified design system covering color, typography, elevation, and component documentation. Redesigned multiple admin interfaces into a modern settings experience with multi-step forms. Mapped authentication and navigation flows to support cross-functional alignment.

media.caption: Color System: Structured palette of support colors and grayscale range. Each swatch includes names, hex codes, and RGB values, organized to accommodate brand identity and accessibility standards.
Typography Styles: Type style guide establishing consistent text styles for headings, subheadings, body text, quotes, and links with variations in size, weight, decoration, and casing.
Font Family Guide: Open Sans and Open Sans Condensed. Weights, styles, and application examples for branding consistency.
Typographic and Layout Variations: Full-width and multi-column layout explorations optimizing readability, alignment, and spacing across different use cases.
Elevation Styles: Six elevation levels ($elevation-1 through $elevation-6) standardized for consistent shadow and depth across interactive and static components.

Design System Overview: Complete Tremor Design System in Figma: modals, chips, tables, elevations, typography, colors, buttons, form elements, navigation patterns, and other UI components organized for designer and developer collaboration.
Add Account Form: Well-structured form with real-time validation (green for valid entries, red for errors), toggle switches, and a clean sidebar with logically grouped menu items.

Account Settings: Profile overview, authorization (password, 2FA, deactivation), platform preferences (language, time zone, delimiters), and notification toggles. Color-coded actions: green for save, red for deactivate.
Get Started Screen: Introduction to the Auction Setup Tool with instructional text and prominent start action. Sidebar navigation to related features.
Add User Form: User onboarding form with profile and contact sections, dropdown menus, toggle switches, and clear action buttons.

Authentication Flow: Login, account creation, and credential recovery through guided pathways. Step-by-step validation with retry loops. Visual cues (green for success, red for failure) highlighting decision points and feedback loops.

Navigation Structure: Hierarchical sitemap connecting core functionalities: login, dashboard, analytics, notifications, settings, admin tools. Sub-pages for listings, results, audit logs, and preferences.

High-Level Prototype: Dark theme data-driven application organized into logical modules: Results, Preferences, Listing Detail, and Audit Log. Defined user flows and navigation paths detail the connections between screens, charts, data tables, and settings panels.
Administrative Tool: Structured workflow for Settings, Placements, and Admin/Manage Accounts. Extensive user flows for adding, editing, and managing accounts with complex decision paths.
